allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=password rtk psql -h localhost -U postgres -d brol -c "SELECT \\"id\\", \\"email\\", \\"country\\", \\"postalCode\\", \\"city\\", \\"lat\\", \\"lng\\" FROM \\"users\\" WHERE \\"postalCode\\" = '4960' OR \\"city\\" ILIKE '%malmedy%' ORDER BY \\"createdAt\\" DESC;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password rtk psql -h localhost -U postgres -d brol -c "SELECT o.\\"id\\", o.\\"name\\", o.\\"author\\", o.\\"objectType\\", c.\\"userId\\", u.\\"email\\", u.\\"lat\\", u.\\"lng\\" FROM \\"objects\\" o JOIN \\"collections\\" c ON o.\\"collectionId\\" = c.\\"id\\" JOIN \\"users\\" u ON c.\\"userId\\" = u.\\"id\\" WHERE o.\\"name\\" ILIKE '%donjon%';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password rtk psql -h localhost -U postgres -d brol -c "SELECT email, country, \\"postalCode\\", city, lat, lng FROM users WHERE lat IS NULL OR lng IS NULL ORDER BY \\"createdAt\\" DESC;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password rtk psql -h localhost -U postgres -d brol -c "SELECT email, \\"postalCode\\", lat, lng FROM users WHERE email IN \('sandrep_85@hotmail.com','aze@aze.aze','boubouloup@live.fr'\);")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password rtk psql -h localhost -U postgres -d brol -c "SELECT n.\\"userId\\", u.email, n.type, n.title, n.\\"relatedId\\", n.\\"createdAt\\" FROM notifications n JOIN users u ON n.\\"userId\\" = u.id WHERE n.type='COMMUNITY_REQUEST' ORDER BY n.\\"createdAt\\" DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.brol.dev NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=https://app.brol.dev NODE_ENV=production rtk pnpm run build)

hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
